subject: Fermi  trigger No 582115625 Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E. Gorbovskoy, V.Kornilov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, F.Balakin,

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich, Yu. Sergienko 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)




MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB190613.45 (trigger No 582115625, 20h 20m 45.60s , - 8d 42m 36.00s, R=2.87) errorbox  34489 sec after trigger time at 2019-06-13 20:21:49 UT, with upper limit up to  19.0 mag. The observations began at zenit distance = 75 deg. The sun  altitude  is -58.5 deg. 

MASTER-Tavrida robotic telescope  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, SAI Crimea astronomical station) started inspect of the Fermi GRB190613.45 errorbox  36023 sec after trigger time at 2019-06-13 20:47:23 UT, with upper limit up to  17.6 mag. The observations began at zenit distance = 74 deg. The sun  altitude  is -21.6 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -60 deg., longitude l = 98 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1048399

We obtain a following upper limits.
